one_time_description: Government subsidies (CEWS/COVID-19) of $898,792 and forgiveness of long-term debt of $278,779
economic_notes: Nation operates multiple businesses including gas bar, real estate, automotive, restaurant franchises (Robins Donuts, Subway), art gallery, ambulance authority, medical services, bingo, and oil/gas properties. Kisoniyaminaw Heritage Trust Fund net assets of $533.6M. Nipisihkopahk Iyinisiwin Trust Fund net assets of $36.1M. Two excluded GBEs: Peace Hills Trust Company and Peace Hills General Insurance Company with combined net assets of $166.2M excluded from consolidation.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on two bases: (1) Peace Hills Trust Company and Peace Hills General Insurance Company are excluded from consolidation contrary to PSAB standards - their inclusion would increase accumulated surplus by $166.2M; (2) A judgment re overpayment of royalties of $8.0M has not been recorded as a liability. Remeasurement gains of $97.3M recorded due to investment portfolio gains in KHTF and NITF trust funds. Large trust funds: KHTF ($533.6M) and NITF ($36.1M) are consolidated. Expenses_health includes Community Wellness & Family Support segment ($14,549,908). Expenses_administration represents Governance segment. Nation Businesses segment expenses of $25,300,417 represent consolidated business operations. Operational & Justice Support segment expenses of $5,125,506 and Nation Projects segment of $9,736,818 and Other Programs of $3,725,199 not mapped to standard categories.
